metadata.title: Brief an das International Copyright Bureau vom 1. Juni 1940, SZ-AAP/B3.25

context:
## Dieses Dokument

- Titel: Brief an das International Copyright Bureau vom 1. Juni 1940, SZ-AAP/B3.25
- Signatur: SZ-AAP/B3.25
- Sprache: Englisch
- Objekttyp: Brief
- Umfang: 5 Scans

result.raw:
{
  "pages": [
    {
      "page": 1,
      "transcription": "1st June 1940.

International Copyright Bureau,
Dewar House, Haymarket,
London S.W.1.

Dear Sir,

I thank you for your letter of
May 30th which is important for me as
it confirms my statement that I have never
been informed or been asked for my consent
neither by the Theatre Guild nor by Dr. Pau-
ker nor by the International Copyright Bu-
reau about the dealings with my property.

Yours very truly,",
      "notes": "Typoskript auf Papier. Oben rechts handschriftliche Archivnummer '35' in roter Tinte."
    },

      "notes": "Rückseite des Dokuments, leer."
